citation.title: A Matsushima theorem for K-polystable polarised smooth Fano threefolds

data.abstract: We prove that if $X$ is a smooth Fano threefold and $L$ is an ample $\mathbb{Q}$-divisor such that $(X,L)$ is K-polystable, then the automorphism group $\operatorname{Aut}(X)$ is reductive. This verifies the reductivity statement predicted by the Yau--Tian--Donaldson conjecture in the setting of smooth Fano threefolds with arbitrary ample polarisation.
